title: Article 21 in Constitution of India
text: Article 21 in Constitution of India 21. Protection of life and personal liberty No person shall be deprived of his life or personal liberty except ... according to procedure established by law. Editorial Comment - Article 21 of the Indian Constitution guarantees the fundamental right to protection of life and personal liberty
